page_metadata.biotools__summary: MS-Deconv is a combinatorial algorithm for spectral deconvolution. The algorithm first generates a large set of candidate isotopomer envelopes for a spectrum, then represents the spectrum as a graph, and finally selects its highest scoring subset of envelopes as a heaviest path in the graph.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MS-Deconv is a combinatorial algorithm for spectral deconvolution.
